title: Nilpotent graphs of the rings Zn
authors: Faculty of Education - Ha Tinh University
Faculty of Education - Ha Tinh University
Master class 26, Algebra and Number Theory - Vinh University
Students K8 Mathematics Pedagogy - Ha Tinh University
author_string: Faculty of Education - Ha Tinh University, Van An, LE, Thi Hai Anh, NGUYEN, Faculty of Education - Ha Tinh University, Thi Thanh Huyen, NGUYEN et al.
abstract: In [4], Basnet-Sharma-Dutta introduced and studied the concept of the nilpotent graph of a finite commutative ring. In this paper, we calculate the number of connected components of the nilpotent graphs of the rings Zn. Applying this result, we characterize the connective properties and completeness of the nilpotent graphs of the rings Zn.
